'''Nivek''', also know as '''Night Planet''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], known as a "night planet" due to the perpetual darkness which shrouded its surface.

Nivek was inhabited by the nefarious [[Shadowman|Shadowmen]], who were sympathetic towards the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] cause during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Approximately five months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were sent on a [[mission to Nivek]], and were nearly defeated by the fierce, well-equipped natives. However, they were able to locate and destroy a Separatist factory on the planet, and escaped with their lives.
